jp.title: キーウやウクライナ各地で市民がフェドロウ国防相解任に抗議集会開催
jp.description: １６日、キーウ中心部のイヴァン・フランコ広場で、市民がミハイロ・フェドロウ国防相の解任への抗議を表明する集会を開催している。 — ウクルインフォルム.

jp.title: ロシアとウクライナ、黒海・アゾフ海で船舶攻撃 小麦価格急騰
jp.description: ウクライナとロシアは１６日、黒海とアゾフ海の船舶に対してミサイルとドローン（無人機）による攻撃を実施し、戦闘が激化した。両海域は穀物輸出に極めて重要な地域で、攻撃を受けて世界の小麦​価格が上昇している。

jp.title: ヘグセス氏、米軍でテストステロン欠乏症の検査を開始すると発言
jp.description: 米国防総省のヘグセス長官は15日、30歳以上の軍人を対象に、毎年の健康診断の一環としてテストステロン欠乏症の検査を実施すると発表した。テストステロン値が低い兵士には、任意でホルモン補充療法が提供されるという。

jp.title: 日産、新型「エルグランド」発売記念イベントを開催 なぜ走りにこだわるのか、なぜe-4ORCE仕様だけの設定なのか？
jp.description: 日産自動車は7月16日、同日に発売した新型「エルグランド」の発売記念イベントを日産グローバル本社ギャラリー（神奈川県横浜市西区）で開催した。

world.title: EU visas must be reduced for Russians, commissioner says
world.description: The EU needs to do more on reducing the number of visas to Russian citizens, the bloc's internal affairs commissioner has said.

world.title: Sonos Brings Tab Navigation, Speaker Sorting And More To Its App
world.description: Sonos has added some handy quality-of-life updates to its mobile app.

world.title: Corus confirms unspecified number of layoffs at Global News
world.description: Corus Entertainment, owner of the Global Television Network, has confirmed plans for an unspecified number of layoffs. The company says the changes are an effort to “strengthen and sustain” its news divisions.

world.description: Nurse Mary Provided Dedicated Health Support To Works Minister — Kaduna LG boss

world.title: 1Password for Claude Lets AI Log In Without Seeing Your Passwords
world.description: Popular password management app 1Password today added Claude support, which means AI service Claude can access credentials stored in 1Password for completing browser tasks. With the integration, Claude can use 1Password logins and one-time codes without the actual password being exposed to Claude. Passwords never reach Claude's context, memory, or Anthropic's systems. When Claude wants to sign in to a website, 1Password shows the user which credential Claude wants access to and why.

world.title: 'Brace yourselves for disappointment from President Mahama' - NAGRAT tells teachers
world.description: The National Association of Graduate Teachers (NAGRAT) has cautioned its members to prepare for possible disappointment after indications from government suggested that several commitments under the expired collective agreement may not be implemented this year .

world.title: New law will remove annual passenger cap at Dublin Airport
world.description: Known as the Dublin Airport (Passenger Capacity) Act 2026, the legislation will grant the minister for transport powers to lift the 32 million annual passenger restriction.

world.title: NEET-UG 2026 exam results declared; 11.21 lakh candidates qualify for medical admissions
world.description: NEET-UG 2026 results are out; 11.21 lakh candidates qualify, with Aryan Gupta and Panshul Bansal topping the re-exam.
